steps.title: Identify the core claim
steps.content: The underlined portion asserts that the novel juxtaposes literary realism with Turkish folklore—placing these contrasting elements side by side.

steps.title: Find the choice showing this juxtaposition
steps.content:
Choice B directly demonstrates it: the realistic plot is “repeatedly and productively disrupted” by Turkish folklore elements.

The others describe literary influences or modes of alternation, missing the specific disruptive quality that defines the claimed juxtaposition.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
